# ListHQ

> Australia's only property platform with listings translated into 24 languages — built for agents, buyers, property managers, and investors.

ListHQ is a two-sided multilingual property marketplace built for the Australian market. It combines traditional property search with enterprise-grade property management, trust accounting compliant with the Agents Financial Administration Act 2014 (AFA 2014), and AI tools including voice search, multilingual AI listing generation (24 languages), seller likelihood scoring, buyer concierge matching (Halo reverse marketplace), and AI-generated offer letters.

## For Agents

- List properties (sale and rental) with AI-generated descriptions translated into 24 languages including Mandarin, Vietnamese, Korean, Arabic, Hindi

- Access seller likelihood scores to identify motivated vendors in any suburb

- Manage rent rolls, trust accounting (AFA 2014 compliant), and arrears chasing

- Network with other agents via the off-market pocket listing network (25% co-broke split)

- E-signature document workflows for leases and contracts

- Commission calculator, CRM pipeline, and vendor campaign reporting built-in

- International referral agent network: earn $500–$2,000 per settled cross-border sale

## For Buyers & Renters

- Search properties by suburb, price, bedrooms across Australia — in your language

- Post a Halo (reverse property brief): describe what you want, get matched to multilingual agents

- Voice search powered by AI

- Save searches and receive instant alerts for new listings

- Pre-approval integration with mortgage brokers

- View open homes and book inspections online

- Listings available in Mandarin, Vietnamese, Korean, Arabic, Hindi, and 19 more languages

## For Property Managers

- Full rent roll and trust accounting (AFA 2014 compliant)

- Automated arrears chasing and TICA checks

- Smoke alarm compliance tracking

- Bond claim management

- Maintenance job dispatch with supplier portal

- Owner statements and trust reconciliation with period locking

## For Investors & International Buyers

- Off-plan and off-market listings

- Multilingual buyer briefs matched to listings

- International referral agent program for cross-border transactions

- Mortgage broker matching

## Key Pages

- /buy — property listings for sale

- /rent — rental listings

- /agents — find a multilingual real estate agent

- /halo/new — post a reverse property brief

- /brokers — find a multilingual mortgage broker

- /referral/join — join the international referral agent network

- /agent-auth — agent and property manager login

## Technology

ListHQ is built on Supabase (PostgreSQL), React 18, and Cloudflare edge infrastructure. All property data is served via structured JSON-LD (Schema.org RealEstateListing) for AI and search engine discoverability.
